title: Unofficial Monumenta 3D Models
description: This pack replaces some of Monumenta's item textures with high quality 3D models for those who like models instead of flat textured items.
body:
# Unofficial Monumenta Models Pack

A models pack for the Minecraft CTM MMORPG, **Monumenta**. This is meant for those who prefer 3d models over flat item textures; much like myself, or want a change of pace. These fully replace the in-game models for the items displayed.

If, for any reason, you prefer a certain item's in-game texture over mine, simply navigate into the ZIP file, find it's corresponding folder, and delete it. It will no longer replace it ingame.

*I am in no way affiliated with the team behind Monumenta. These models are simply produced over time as I play and enjoy the game.*

## Requirements
 - [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn/)  
**OR**
 - [Optifine](https://www.optifine.net/home)  
*And their requirements, if and where applicable*

My pack takes advantage of the CIT features in either of the aforementioned mods. Monumenta's main resource pack uses this as well.

## Links 
[Monumenta's Website](https://playmonumenta.com/)  
[Monumenta's Discord](https://discord.com/invite/eep9qcu)
